source_pr.title: store/tikv: move ticlient_test to /tests
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
store/tikv has dependencies on `mockstore` and `unistore` because tests need to use them. We can resolve it by moving all tests to standaline package.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- move test files into `store/tikv/tests`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: // +build !race.
